2024-06-21.thesis: ADVANCE Act nuclear licensing bill advances in Congress
2024-06-21.exit_case: ADVANCE Act passed Senate, heading to President's desk - legislative process substantively complete/resolved.
2024-06-21.assessment: After 8 weeks of silence-decayed conviction, the ADVANCE Act cleared the Senate on June 18 and now heads to the President's desk for signature - this is the final legislative milestone I was tracking (bipartisan NRC licensing/fee reform for advanced reactors). The catalyst has resolved: passage through Congress is done, only ministerial presidential signature remains, which is not in doubt given bipartisan support. Per rules, catalyst_resolved=true forces thesis_live=false even though NuScale stock reportedly 'heated up' this week - that's the market pricing in the now-public, already-resolved event. Separately, fresh NuScale-specific coverage (Fool.com) flags cash-burn concerns, undercutting the pure-play bull case further. This is a clean exit: the specific bill-passage catalyst is done, not a mere quiet stretch.
2024-06-21.exit_advice: Exit SMR - the specific catalyst (Congressional passage of ADVANCE Act) has now occurred; presidential signature is a formality and the news is fully public/priced. Edge from this legislative event is gone regardless of pending signature or lingering AI-nuclear theme.
